Precondition: Employee account exists and is active
Test Steps: Open prototype; enter emma.employee@benji.test and Employee#123; click Log In
Expected Result: Employee is authenticated and redirected to Employee Dashboard

Precondition: Prototype is on Login screen
Test Steps: Enter an incorrect password; click Log In
Expected Result: System displays login failure message and does not open a protected screen

Precondition: Admin account exists and is active
Test Steps: Use admin login from Login screen
Expected Result: Admin is redirected to Admin Dashboard with admin navigation

Precondition: Employee is logged in and active pay period is open
Test Steps: Open Log Hours; enter valid date, hours, program, and notes; click Submit Entry
Expected Result: Entry is saved with PENDING status and user is redirected to My Timesheets

Precondition: Employee is logged in
Test Steps: Open Log Hours; choose a date after 2026-07-19; click Submit Entry
Expected Result: System displays Future date not allowed and does not save the entry

Precondition: Employee is logged in
Test Steps: Open Log Hours; enter 0 or more than 24 hours; click Submit Entry
Expected Result: System displays hours validation message and does not save the entry

Precondition: Employee is logged in and an entry exists for same date/program
Test Steps: Submit a second entry with same employee, date, and program
Expected Result: System displays duplicate entry message and does not save the second entry

Precondition: Admin is logged in and at least one pending entry exists
Test Steps: Open Review Queue
Expected Result: Pending entries appear in a reviewable table with Review action

Precondition: Admin is logged in and a pending entry exists
Test Steps: Open Review Queue; click Review; click Approve
Expected Result: Entry status changes to APPROVED; audit event is recorded; queue refreshes

Feature / Touchpoint: Require notes when rejecting or flagging
Precondition: Admin is reviewing a pending entry
Test Steps: Click Review; leave note blank; click Reject or Flag
Expected Result: System displays reviewer notes required and does not save decision

Precondition: Employee has an entry reviewed by admin
Test Steps: Log in as employee; open My Timesheets
Expected Result: Reviewed entry displays updated APPROVED/REJECTED/FLAGGED status

Precondition: Admin is logged in and approved entries exist
Test Steps: Open Reports; click Generate Report
Expected Result: Report displays employee rows

Feature / Touchpoint: Account lockout after repeated failed logins
Precondition: Prototype is on Login screen
Test Steps: Enter a wrong password 5 times for an account; then try the correct password
Expected Result: System locks the account at the fifth failure and rejects logins until the 15-minute lockout expires

Precondition: User is logged in
Test Steps: Remain inactive past the 15-minute session limit
Expected Result: System logs the user out and shows a session-expired notice on the Login screen

Precondition: Entries or decisions have been changed
Test Steps: Submit or review entries; reload the browser page
Expected Result: Prototype restores entries
column8: and audit history from browser storage

Precondition: Prototype has modified data
Test Steps: Open Login screen; click Reset Demo Data
Expected Result: Stored data is cleared and the seeded demo scenario is restored with a confirmation notice

Precondition: Admin generated a payroll report
Test Steps: Click Export CSV on the Reports screen
Expected Result: A CSV file with report rows and totals downloads and an audit event is recorded

Feature / Touchpoint: Finalize pay run creates pay stubs
Precondition: Approved entries exist that are not on a pay stub
Test Steps: Click Finalize Pay Run on the Reports screen; click it again
Expected Result: Pay stubs are generated per employee; repeated finalization reports no eligible entries

Precondition: Admin is on Employee Directory
Test Steps: Click Add Employee; submit invalid then valid name, role, rate, and tax values
Expected Result: Invalid values show inline errors; valid employee is saved as ACTIVE with an audit event

Precondition: Employee record exists
Test Steps: Edit an employee's rate; deactivate the employee; log in as that employee and submit hours
Expected Result: Updates save with audit events; INACTIVE badge appears; inactive employee cannot submit new hours
